name: marta-do-vale-site
description: A polished static portfolio site for Marta do Vale, art director and production designer.

scripts.build:css: tailwindcss -i ./src/input.css -o ./styles.css --minify && python3 -c "from pathlib import Path; import re; p=Path('styles.css'); p.write_text(re.sub(r'/\*! tailwindcss v[^*]*\*/','',p.read_text(),count=1))"
scripts.test: npm run build:css && node --check script.js && node --check scripts/build-images.mjs && node --check scripts/build-og-card.mjs && node --check scripts/build-fonts.mjs && node --check scripts/build-vcard.mjs && node --check scripts/check-i18n.mjs && node --check scripts/check-html.mjs && node --check scripts/check-csp-hashes.mjs && node --check scripts/check-image-variants.mjs && node --check scripts/check-preload-coherence.mjs && node --check scripts/check-preconnect-coverage.mjs && node --check scripts/check-external-links.mjs && node --check scripts/check-a11y.mjs && node --check scripts/build-sitemap.mjs && node --check scripts/check-sitemap-freshness.mjs && node --check scripts/check-manifest-icons.mjs && node --check scripts/check-profilepage-graph.mjs && node scripts/check-budget.mjs && node scripts/check-image-variants.mjs && node scripts/check-i18n.mjs && node scripts/check-html.mjs && node scripts/check-a11y.mjs && node scripts/check-external-links.mjs && node scripts/check-preload-coherence.mjs && node scripts/check-preconnect-coverage.mjs && node --check scripts/check-films-sync.mjs && node scripts/check-films-sync.mjs && node scripts/check-sitemap-freshness.mjs && node scripts/check-csp-hashes.mjs && node scripts/build-vcard.mjs --check && node --check scripts/check-contact-parity.mjs && node scripts/check-contact-parity.mjs && node scripts/check-profilepage-graph.mjs && node scripts/check-manifest-icons.mjs
